sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used to load DIT FFT input order.
sub_modules.fft16_index_gen: Combinational stage and butterfly counter decoder that generates p, q, and twiddle indices for the 16-point iterative radix-2 schedule.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM using positive sine values for IFFT conjugated twiddles.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with rounded Q1.15 complex multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational final IFFT normalization block that divides results by 16 and truncates to output width.
